languages.text: Меровцы утверждают, что недавно на заставе дежурил Изимонд и настоял, чтобы весь караул был сменен на его людей.

traits.locale_text: Меровцы утверждают, что недавно на заставе дежурил Изимонд и настоял, чтобы весь караул был сменен на его людей.

languages.text: The Merovians claim that Isimond recently stood watch at the outpost and insisted the entire guard be replaced with his own men.
languages.original_text: Меровцы утверждают, что недавно на заставе дежурил Изимонд и настоял, чтобы весь караул был сменен на его людей.

traits.locale_text: The Merovians claim that Isimond recently stood watch at the outpost and insisted the entire guard be replaced with his own men.

The Merovians claim that Isimond recently stood watch at the outpost and insisted the entire guard be replaced with his own men.

languages.text: Laut den Merovianern hat Isimond kürzlich am Außenposten Wache gestanden und die gesamte Wache durch seine eigenen Männer ersetzen lassen.
languages.original_text: The Merovians claim that Isimond recently stood watch at the outpost and insisted the entire guard be replaced with his own men.

traits.locale_text: Laut den Merovianern hat Isimond kürzlich am Außenposten Wache gestanden und die gesamte Wache durch seine eigenen Männer ersetzen lassen.

languages.text: Les Meroviens affirment qu'Isimond a récemment monté la garde à l'avant-poste et qu'il a insisté pour remplacer tous les effectifs par ses hommes.
languages.original_text: The Merovians claim that Isimond recently stood watch at the outpost and insisted the entire guard be replaced with his own men.

traits.locale_text: Les Meroviens affirment qu'Isimond a récemment monté la garde à l'avant-poste et qu'il a insisté pour remplacer tous les effectifs par ses hommes.

languages.text: 梅罗夫人说，伊西蒙德最近在前哨值守时，坚持要把整支守卫队都换成自己的人。
languages.original_text: The Merovians claim that Isimond recently stood watch at the outpost and insisted the entire guard be replaced with his own men.

traits.locale_text: 梅罗夫人说，伊西蒙德最近在前哨值守时，坚持要把整支守卫队都换成自己的人。

languages.text: Los merovianos afirman que Isimond estuvo destinado hace poco en el puesto avanzado e insistió en sustituir a todo el cuerpo de guardia con sus propios hombres.
languages.original_text: The Merovians claim that Isimond recently stood watch at the outpost and insisted the entire guard be replaced with his own men.

traits.locale_text: Los merovianos afirman que Isimond estuvo destinado hace poco en el puesto avanzado e insistió en sustituir a todo el cuerpo de guardia con sus propios hombres.

languages.text: メロビア人の主張によると、イシモンドと彼の監督官は最近、前哨基地で勤務しており、警備員全員を彼の部下に変更するよう主張したという。
languages.original_text: The Merovians claim that Isimond and his overseers were recently on duty at the outpost and insisted that the entire guard be changed to his men.

languages.text: Merovlular, İsimond'un yakın zamanda karakolda nöbet tuttuğunu ve tüm muhafızların kendi adamlarıyla değiştirilmesinde ısrar ettiğini iddia ediyor.
languages.original_text: The Merovians claim that Isimond recently stood watch at the outpost and insisted the entire guard be replaced with his own men.

traits.locale_text: Merovlular, İsimond'un yakın zamanda karakolda nöbet tuttuğunu ve tüm muhafızların kendi adamlarıyla değiştirilmesinde ısrar ettiğini iddia ediyor.
